'''Lessuris''' was a backwater [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Lessuris system/Legends|Lessuris system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Luskin Exovar]] was born on Lessuris.
